dm_location: Chapter 16 — Technical Standards (p.249); plus rural-housing chapter and Rural Location, Siting & Design Guide 2024-2030
ribbon_development_rule: 5 houses on any one side of 250 m of road frontage
sightline_y: Per relevant national vision lines and stopping sight distances
wastewater_standard: Catchment-specific controls on single-house effluent treatment systems (RH-P-10)
public_open_space_pct: 15% greenfield; 10% infill/certain sites; 20% sites with substantial open lands
trigger_AA: Assessment of plans/projects likely to affect Natura 2000 habitats/species; Natura Impact Statement may be required
trigger_EIA: EU EIA Directive thresholds; Council carries out EIA as necessary; EIS/EIAR may be required
trigger_FRA: Strategic Flood Risk Assessments required; Justification Test in flood zones
trigger_AHIA: Architectural heritage non-renewable resource; AHIA expectation for works affecting protected structures
notes: DRAFT plan — figures can change at adoption; re-verify. Residential parking ratios and separation distances not cleanly tabulated in extracted Chapter 16 — see raw/ PDFs. Caravan/camping parks max 50 caravans/ha. Car parking bay 5 m × 2.5 m.
